THE RED MONKEY

Warm toasted malt flavours create a rich bitter with a satisfying blend of chestnut and autumn spice.

Red Kite

4.3% Brown

Brewery Vale
Style & ABV 4.3% Brown

Tasting Notes

Warm toasted malt flavours create a rich bitter with a satisfying blend of chestnut and autumn spice.
